Get your .sol domain that can be used to represent you in the metaverse

A way to represent yourself uniquely,

other than
marcPwJA...nwsMPSW5marcP...MPSW5marcP...MPSW5

Quickly send and receive funds to a human-readable address

Worry no more about long, unmemorable wallet addresses. Transact directly from domain to domain instead of a cryptic key.

Learn more

Get verified so everyone knows it's really you

Confirm your identity by linking your Twitter handle to your wallet address. Enjoy the added advantage of easy funds transferring straight to registered handles.

Learn more

Collect and exchange .sol names directly or as NFTs

Use, transfer and resell valuable domain names. Become profitable from these one-of-a-kind domains with our broad NFT marketplace support.

Learn more

Host projects with your unique and exotic domain name

Benefit from the power of decentralization by hosting your favorite website or app with your personal domain. Think Google, but Web 3.0, uncensorable and 100% private ownership.
